sprints.name: MVP: Dipole + MoM + S11
sprints.description: Implement basic MoM solver for dipole antenna, display S11 results, and import Touchstone files for comparison

tasks.title: Implement MoM impedance matrix builder
tasks.description: Complete impedance matrix construction using Green's function integration for wire segments
acceptance_criteria: build_impedance_matrix() returns NxN complex matrix for N segments
Green's function evaluation matches analytical formula within 1% error
Matrix is symmetric (Z_mn = Z_nm) for reciprocal structures

tasks.title: Implement MoM linear solver
tasks.description: Solve Ax=b using LU decomposition to find current distribution
acceptance_criteria: Dipole impedance: 73±5 + j42.5±5 Ω at resonance
Solver handles ill-conditioned matrices with pivoting

tasks.title: S-parameter extraction from port impedance
tasks.description: Calculate S11 from antenna input impedance relative to 50Ω

tasks.title: Frequency sweep functionality
tasks.description: Run MoM solver at multiple frequencies and return S11 array
acceptance_criteria: Returns Vec<(f64, Complex<f64>)> for frequency vs S11
Sweep 50-500 MHz in ≤10 seconds for 100-segment dipole

tasks.title: Tauri command: simulate_antenna
tasks.description: Expose MoM solver to frontend via Tauri command
acceptance_criteria: SimulationResult contains s11_data: Vec<{freq: f64, s11_db: f64}>

tasks.title: Complete AntennaForm for dipole parameters
tasks.description: Input fields for dipole length, radius, and frequency range
acceptance_criteria: Frequency range: start/stop/step with MHz units

tasks.title: S11Chart component with Recharts
tasks.description: Display S11 magnitude in dB vs frequency
acceptance_criteria: Chart displays frequency (MHz) on X-axis, S11 (dB) on Y-axis
Hover tooltip shows exact frequency and S11 value
Chart updates when new simulation data arrives

tasks.title: Touchstone file import (.s1p)
tasks.description: Import measured S-parameter data for comparison
acceptance_criteria: Imported data overlays on S11Chart in different color

tasks.title: Basic dipole visualization
tasks.description: Render dipole antenna as cylindrical segments in 3D
acceptance_criteria: Dipole renders as cylinder with correct length/radius

tasks.title: Unit tests for MoM solver
tasks.description: Validate solver accuracy against analytical solutions
acceptance_criteria: Test half-wave dipole: Z_in within 10% of 73+j42.5Ω

sprints.name: GPU Acceleration + Advanced Antennas
sprints.description: Implement GPU-accelerated matrix fill, add QFH and patch antennas, enhance visualization

tasks.title: wgpu compute shader for impedance matrix
tasks.description: Parallel computation of mutual impedances on GPU
acceptance_criteria: Compute shader evaluates Green's function for all segment pairs
GPU matrix fill ≥5x faster than CPU for 1000+ segments
Results match CPU implementation within 0.1% error

tasks.title: QFH antenna geometry generation
tasks.description: Generate quadrifilar helix geometry from parameters
acceptance_criteria: Helix pitch and diameter match specifications

tasks.title: Patch antenna with substrate
tasks.description: Implement patch antenna with dielectric substrate effects
acceptance_criteria: Edge feeding at correct impedance point

tasks.title: Radiation pattern calculation
tasks.description: Compute far-field radiation pattern from current distribution
acceptance_criteria: calculate_radiation_pattern() returns gain at θ,φ points
Dipole pattern: figure-8 in E-plane, omnidirectional H-plane
Peak gain calculation accurate within 0.5 dB

tasks.title: AntennaForm for QFH and Patch
tasks.description: Parameter inputs for helix and patch antennas
acceptance_criteria: QFH: frequency, turns, diameter, height, wire radius inputs
Patch: width, length, substrate height, permittivity inputs

tasks.title: ResultsPanel with key metrics
tasks.description: Display resonant frequency, bandwidth, VSWR

tasks.title: QFH and patch visualization
tasks.description: Render helix and patch geometries in 3D viewport
acceptance_criteria: QFH renders as 4 helical curves with proper phasing
Patch renders as rectangular surface with ground plane
Smooth transitions when switching antenna types

tasks.title: Current distribution overlay
tasks.description: Color-map current magnitude on antenna surface
acceptance_criteria: Current magnitude mapped to color gradient (blue→red)
Color scale legend shows current in A/m

tasks.title: GPU performance benchmarking
tasks.description: Measure and optimize GPU kernel performance
acceptance_criteria: Benchmark tool compares CPU vs GPU for various antenna sizes
Performance metrics logged: matrix fill time, memory usage
Results exported as CSV for analysis

tasks.title: Progress indicators for long simulations
tasks.description: Show simulation progress for frequency sweeps
acceptance_criteria: Progress bar shows % complete during sweep
Time remaining estimate based on completed steps

sprints.name: Dataset Generation + Pattern Visualization
sprints.description: Generate training data for AI models, implement radiation pattern visualization

tasks.title: Batch simulation API
tasks.description: Run MoM solver for parameter sweeps to generate datasets
acceptance_criteria: batch_simulate() accepts parameter ranges and variations
Output format: JSON with params + S11 + radiation pattern
Parallel execution using Rayon for multi-core CPUs

tasks.title: Dataset export functionality
tasks.description: Save simulation results in ML-friendly format
acceptance_criteria: Export to HDF5 with hierarchical structure
Include: parameters, S11 curves, patterns, impedances

tasks.title: 3D radiation pattern visualization
tasks.description: Render radiation pattern as 3D surface
acceptance_criteria: Interactive rotation with gain value on hover
Toggle between E-plane and H-plane cuts

tasks.title: 2D polar pattern plots
tasks.description: Traditional polar plots for E/H plane cuts
acceptance_criteria: Polar plot with concentric dB circles

tasks.title: Smith chart for impedance
tasks.description: Display impedance on Smith chart
acceptance_criteria: Standard Smith chart with impedance/admittance circles
Click to show impedance at frequency

tasks.title: Dataset validation and splitting
tasks.description: Prepare datasets for ML training
acceptance_criteria: Load HDF5 datasets from core batch simulations
Data normalization: parameters to [-1,1], S11 in dB

tasks.title: Parameter space coverage analysis
tasks.description: Ensure dataset covers design space adequately
acceptance_criteria: Latin hypercube sampling for uniform coverage

tasks.title: Multi-GPU support for batch runs
tasks.description: Distribute batch simulations across multiple GPUs
acceptance_criteria: Detect available GPUs and distribute work
Linear scaling up to 4 GPUs (>3.5x speedup)

tasks.title: Batch simulation UI
tasks.description: Interface for configuring parameter sweeps

tasks.title: Animation of frequency sweep
tasks.description: Animate current distribution across frequencies
acceptance_criteria: Play button animates through frequency range

sprints.name: AI Surrogate Models + Optimization
sprints.description: Train neural networks on simulation data, implement fast optimization using surrogates

tasks.title: S11 prediction neural network
tasks.description: Train model to predict S11 curves from antenna parameters
acceptance_criteria: Input: antenna params, Output: S11 vs frequency
Mean absolute error < 1 dB across test set

tasks.title: Pattern prediction network
tasks.description: Predict radiation patterns from antenna geometry
acceptance_criteria: Separate models for each antenna type

tasks.title: ONNX export and optimization
tasks.description: Export trained models for deployment
acceptance_criteria: Export PyTorch models to ONNX format
ONNX runtime inference matches PyTorch within 0.1%
Include metadata: input ranges, units, version

tasks.title: Optimization algorithm using surrogates
tasks.description: Fast antenna optimization via surrogate models
acceptance_criteria: Minimize S11 at target frequency using gradient descent
Return top-5 designs ranked by objective

tasks.title: REST API for predictions
tasks.description: FastAPI endpoints for surrogate model inference

tasks.title: ONNX runtime integration
tasks.description: Load and run ONNX models from Rust
acceptance_criteria: Load ONNX models via ort crate
Fallback to MoM solver if model fails

tasks.title: Optimization UI panel
tasks.description: Interface for AI-driven optimization
acceptance_criteria: Target frequency and S11 goal inputs

tasks.title: Model accuracy indicators
tasks.description: Show when using AI predictions vs full simulation
acceptance_criteria: Icon indicates AI/MoM mode for current results
Button to run full MoM verification
Warning if parameters outside training range

tasks.title: Optimization trajectory visualization
tasks.description: Show parameter evolution during optimization
acceptance_criteria: Click point to load that design

tasks.title: GPU inference for ONNX models
tasks.description: Accelerate neural network inference on GPU
acceptance_criteria: 5x speedup vs CPU for batch size >100

sprints.name: Polish + Reporting + Deployment
sprints.description: Project save/load, report generation, performance optimization, and release preparation

tasks.title: Project file format and save/load
tasks.description: Serialize complete project state
acceptance_criteria: Save antenna configs, results, and settings to .promin file
File format: versioned JSON with embedded binary data
Load restores exact UI state including viewport camera

tasks.title: Report generation system
tasks.description: Export professional PDF reports
acceptance_criteria: Include: antenna image, S11/pattern plots, parameters table
Company logo and project metadata support

tasks.title: Preferences and settings panel
tasks.description: User preferences for units, defaults, appearance
acceptance_criteria: Default frequency ranges per antenna type

tasks.title: Performance profiling and optimization
tasks.description: Identify and fix performance bottlenecks

tasks.title: High-quality rendering mode
tasks.description: Publication-ready 3D renders
acceptance_criteria: Export viewport as PNG at custom resolution

tasks.title: Keyboard shortcuts and productivity
tasks.description: Power user features for efficiency
acceptance_criteria: Ctrl+S save, Ctrl+O open, Ctrl+N new project
F5 run simulation, Esc cancel operation

tasks.title: Comprehensive error handling
tasks.description: Graceful handling of edge cases
acceptance_criteria: Handle singular matrices with informative errors
All errors shown in UI, not console

tasks.title: GPU compatibility testing
tasks.description: Ensure broad GPU support
acceptance_criteria: Test on NVIDIA, AMD, Intel GPUs
Disable GPU features on old hardware

tasks.title: Model versioning and updates
tasks.description: System for updating AI models post-release
acceptance_criteria: Models tagged with version and training date
Check for updates from model repository
Rollback to previous version if needed

tasks.title: Tutorial and help system
tasks.description: In-app guidance for new users

shared_interfaces_needed: SimulationResult type shared between core and UI teams
ONNX model format specification for aiml→core handoff
GPU kernel interface between core and gpu teams
Batch simulation job format for distributed processing
Project file schema for save/load functionality
